meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Laptop repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Laptop Repair Winnipeg | Asus, Acer, Lenovo, HP, Dell & More
page.metaDescription: Expert Windows laptop and Chromebook repair in Winnipeg. Screen replacement, battery service, keyboard repair, SSD upgrades. All brands serviced. Same-day available.
page.h1: Winnipeg's Windows Laptop & Chromebook Repair Experts
page.heroDescription: From cracked screens to dead batteries, overheating issues to keyboard failures—we repair all Windows laptops and Chromebooks.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: We replace LCD and LED screens on all laptop brands and sizes.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore your laptop's portability with a new battery.

services.name: Keyboard Replacement
services.description: Broken keys, liquid damage, or unresponsive keyboard.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Fix loose or damaged DC jacks and USB-C charging ports.

services.name: Overheating & Fan Repair
services.description: Clean, repair, or replace cooling systems.

services.name: SSD & RAM Upgrades
services.description: Speed up your laptop with an SSD upgrade or additional RAM.

services.name: Hinge Repair
services.description: Loose or broken hinges? We repair and reinforce laptop hinges.

services.name: Motherboard Repair
services.description: Component-level motherboard repair for power issues or no display.

advantage_pillars.title: All Brands Welcome
advantage_pillars.description: We service Asus, Acer, Lenovo, HP, Dell, Toshiba, Chromebooks, and more.

advantage_pillars.title: Upgrade Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: SSD and RAM upgrades to breathe new life into your existing laptop.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repairs from 30 days to lifetime. 90-day battery warranty. Most other repairs include lifetime warranty.

model_categories.title: Asus
model_categories.description: Gaming, ultrabook, and budget laptop repairs.

model_categories.title: Acer
model_categories.description: Full range from budget to gaming laptops.

model_categories.title: Other Brands
model_categories.description: We service virtually any Windows laptop or Chromebook.

models_description: We service all major laptop brands. Don't see your specific model? Contact us.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Laptop repair costs vary widely based on screen size, resolution, and internal design. Manufacturers like Lenovo and HP provide support documentation.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised when a laptop screen replacement costs nearly as much as a budget laptop. iFixit's laptop repair guides rate repairability across brands.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches or exceeds your laptop's current value, we'll explain that honestly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't cost-effective, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: How long does a laptop screen replacement take?
faqs.answer: Most laptop screen replacements can be completed within 1-2 hours if we have the part in stock.

faqs.question: Can you upgrade my laptop's RAM and SSD?
faqs.answer: Yes! We perform RAM and SSD upgrades on most laptops.

faqs.question: My laptop won't turn on. Can you fix it?
faqs.answer: We can diagnose power issues ranging from simple battery/charger problems to complex motherboard failures.

faqs.question: Do you repair Chromebooks?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We service all Chromebook brands.

faqs.question: Is it worth repairing my old laptop?
faqs.answer: It depends on the repair cost vs. the laptop's value. We provide honest assessments.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Thompson, and surrounding Manitoba communities.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
